---
name: "Kelan"
surname: "Gray"
image: ../static/people/students/kelan_gray.jpeg
github: kelangray
info:
  - "I am a mathematics PhD student at Imperial working on Koopman operator learning for nonlinear partial differential equations, advised by Dr. Nicolas Boullé and Dr. Matthew Colbrook. "
interests:
  - Koopman Operators
education:
  - institution: University of Amsterdam
    location: Amsterdam, Netherlands
    degree: Msc Mathematics
    startdate: Sept 2023
    enddate: Jul 2025
  - institution: University of Manchester
    location: Manchester, UK
    degree: Bsc in Mathematics with Computer Science
    startdate: Sep 2020
    enddate: Jul 2023
---

{{< academic-webpage >}}
